free_text: Thermal neutron capture cross-section and resonance
La2O3 and Ce2O powder samples are used. The weight of
the La2O3 and Ce2O were 511+-11 mg and 1000+-2 mg
respectively. Activation foils of Mn(Mn(83%)-Cu) and
Au having 12 mm diameter with purity 99.9% were used
pre-calibrated using a 152Eu source were used for gamma
The neutron source having yield of 4 x 10E+07
The total uncertainties in thermal cross-section
estimation are between 2% and 5% and the total
uncertainties in the resonance integral are between
